name: Newsletter Cinemas Quartier Latin

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 7 * * 1"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  envoyer-newsletter:

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Recuperer le projet
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Installer Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Installer les dependances
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Envoyer la newsletter
        env:
          RESEND_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.RESEND_API_KEY }}
        run: |
          cd src
          python main.py
